entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for iron deficiency chlorosis resistance and yield.

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A physiological disorder caused by iron deficiency that reduces crop yield.

entities.name: CALCAREOUS AND ALKALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soil types characterized by high calcium carbonate and high pH, which promote iron deficiency chlorosis.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the groundnut is grown in calcareous and alkaline soils.

entities.name: IDC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to maintain growth and yield under iron-deficient conditions.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of the groundnut crop.

entities.name: FACTORIAL POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The experimental design used to assess the effects of soil-Fe status and genotypes.

entities.name: SOIL-FE STATUS
entities.description: The availability of iron in the soil, categorized as normal-Fe or deficit-Fe.

entities.name: VISUAL CHLOROSIS RATING
entities.description: A qualitative measure used to assess the severity of chlorosis symptoms.

entities.name: SPAD VALUES
entities.description: A non-destructive measure of leaf chlorophyll content used as a proxy for iron status.

entities.name: ACTIVE FE
entities.description: The available or biologically active form of iron within the plant.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant leaves.

entities.name: PEROXIDASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The activity level of the peroxidase enzyme, associated with stress response.

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the groundnut seeds, contributing to overall yield.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS
entities.description: The count of pods produced per plant, contributing to overall yield.

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The biomass yield of the stems and leaves of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: MAIN STEM HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the primary stem.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARIES
entities.description: The count of primary branches on the groundnut plant.

entities.name: MORPHO-PHYSIOLOGICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: The set of physical and physiological traits used to assess IDC resistance.
